config.title: Configuration
config.description: Configure here your credentials for WhatsApp Meta API. For any questions, you can refer to the Setup Guide.
config.access_token_hint: Generate this token in Meta Business Settings > System Users. It never expires.
config.phone_id_hint: Found in Meta App > Use Cases > Customize > API Setup
config.verify_token_hint: A secret string without spaces used to verify the webhook on Meta and for bot registration (e.g. my_homey_token)
config.error_verify_token_spaces: The Verify Token cannot contain spaces.
config.webhook_url_hint: Copy this URL and paste it in the Meta Developer Portal as the Callback URL.

template.title: Template Messages
template.description: Template Messages allow sending messages even when the 24-hour service window has expired. To learn how to configure them, refer to the Setup Guide.
template.warning: ⚠️ CAUTION: Template Messages are free as long as you use the test number provided by Meta. However, if you replace the test number with a real phone number, Template Messages become paid according to Meta's rates.
template.template_name_hint: Name of the approved template on Meta Business Manager (e.g. homey_notification).
template.template_language_hint: Language code of the template (e.g. en_US, it).
template.template_parameter_name_hint: Name of the variable in the Meta template (e.g. 'message' for {{message}}). Leave empty for numeric variables (e.g. {{1}}).
template.test_error_missing_config: Fill in Template Name and Language before testing.
template.test_error_no_users: No authorized users. Register a number before testing.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Here you can see all authorized phone numbers to use the bot. You can assign a name to each contact and remove unauthorized numbers.
users.empty: No users registered yet. Send the /register command to the bot to register.
users.delete_confirm: Remove this number from the authorized list?

voice.title: Voice Messages
voice.description: Configure API credentials for voice message transcription. For any questions, you can refer to the Setup Guide.
voice.groq_api_key_hint: GroqCloud API key (console.groq.com). Required for transcribing voice messages via Whisper.

guide.title: Setup Guide
guide.part1_step1: Go to developers.facebook.com and log in with your Facebook account.
guide.part1_step2: Click 'My Apps' in the top-right corner, then 'Create App'.
guide.part1_step3: Under 'Use Cases', select 'Connect with customers through WhatsApp'.
guide.part1_step4: Link the app to a Business Portfolio (you can create one following the wizard — it's free).
guide.part1_step5: Once done, go to 'Use Cases' in the left menu and click 'Customize' on the WhatsApp card.
guide.part1_step6: Open 'API Setup' in the left menu and note your 'Phone number ID'.
guide.part2_step1: Go to business.facebook.com/settings and log in if needed.
guide.part2_step2: In the left menu under 'Users', choose 'System Users' and click 'Add'.
guide.part2_step3: Give the user a name (e.g. HomeyBot), choose the Admin role and click 'Create System User'.
guide.part2_step4: Click the three-dot menu (⋯) next to the user and choose 'Assign Assets'. Select your app, grant Full Control and save by clicking 'Assign Assets' at the bottom-right.
guide.part2_step5: Click 'Generate Token' and follow the guided wizard. When asked to assign permissions, select 'whatsapp_business_messaging' and 'whatsapp_business_management'.
guide.part2_step6: Copy the token immediately — it will only be shown once.
guide.part3_title: Part 3: Configure Homey and the Webhook
guide.part3_step1: Go back to the Configuration page in the Homey app settings and fill in the Token and Phone Number ID.
guide.part3_step2: From the Configuration page, copy the Webhook URL and set a Verify Token of your choice (you will need it both to complete the authentication process on Meta and later to register with the bot). Once done, save the settings.
guide.part3_step3: Go back to your Meta App page -> 'Use Cases' -> 'Customize' -> 'Configuration'.
guide.part3_step4: In Webhook section, paste the Webhook URL as the 'Callback URL' and enter your 'Verify Token'. Then click 'Verify and save'.
guide.part3_step5: Once verification is complete, go back to the 'Configuration' menu and enable the subscription for the 'messages' webhook field.
guide.part4_step1: In your Meta App -> 'Use Cases' -> 'Customize' -> 'API Setup'.
guide.part4_step2: Generate a temporary access token (blue button in the top-right corner). It expires in 24h and is only needed for this step.
guide.part4_step3: In the 'To' dropdown (Step 1: Select phone numbers), select your personal phone number (add and verify it if not present).
guide.part4_step4: Click 'Send Message' (Step 2: Send messages with the API).
guide.part4_step5: You will receive a 'Hello World' message on WhatsApp. The bot is now active, but you must register before using it.
guide.part4_step6: Reply to the welcome message by sending /register [secret_code] to the bot, where secret_code is the Verify Token you chose in Part 3.
guide.part4_step7: The bot will reply with a confirmation message and will finally be ready to use!
guide.part_template_description: Meta grants a 24-hour window from when the user sends the first message for the exchange of free messages with the bot. Beyond this window, to send messages to the user, it will be necessary to use a Template approved by Meta. Pricing Information: Using Template Messages is free as long as you use the test number provided by Meta. However, if you decide to associate a real phone number with your Meta App, sending Template Messages becomes a paid feature (Utility category). To view the updated rates, please visit the Meta Pricing page. The app for Homey will first try to send free messages and only if it fails because more than 24 hours have passed since the last message sent by the user, it will try to send a Template Message but only if the configuration for sending template messages has been completed in the settings.
guide.part_template_step1: Go to developers.facebook.com, enter your App, go to 'Use Cases' and click 'Customize' on the 'Connect with customers through WhatsApp' card.
guide.part_template_step2: Choose the 'Quickstart' tab, click the 'Message Templates' box, and then the 'Create Template' button on the right. Select the 'Utility' category, assign a name, and choose the language (note these details for Homey).
guide.part_template_step3: In the 'Body' field, add a variable (e.g., {{message}}). Remember: the text must have at least 3 words besides the variable, and it cannot be at the start or end. For 'Variable Type' choose 'name'.
guide.part_template_step4: Click 'Submit' for review. Once approved (usually a few hours), you can use it in the app. NB: If Meta changes the category to Marketing, you have 60 days to request a revision to Utility.
guide.part_template_step5: Copy the exact 'Name' and 'Language' here into the 'Template Messages' section of the app and save.
guide.part_voice_step1: Go to console.groq.com and log in or create a free account.
guide.part_voice_step2: In the top-right corner, select 'API Keys'.
guide.part_voice_step3: Click 'Create API Key', give it a name (e.g. HomeyBot), and copy it (it will be shown only once).
guide.part_voice_step4: Go back to the Homey app settings, open the 'Voice Messages' section, paste the key, and save.

flow.action_error_both_recipients: Please fill ONLY one recipient field (either Contact or Number).
flow.action_error_no_recipient: Please fill AT LEAST one recipient field (Contact or Number).
flow.action_error_no_users_registered: No registered users found. Ask users to send /register to the bot first.

bot.registration_required:
You are not authorized to use this Bot. To register you need to know the *secret code* (if you don't know it contact the Bot administrator). Once you have the secret code reply to this chat with the command:

*/register [secret_code]*
bot.registration_success:
Registration successful!
*Now you can use the Bot to control your smart home!*
bot.invalid_token: Invalid security code. If you don't know the security code *contact the Bot administrator* and try again.
bot.voice_transcription_error: ❌ I could not understand your voice message. Please try again or send me a text message instead.
bot.unsupported_message_type: ❌ This type of message is not supported. Please send a text or voice message.
bot.trigger_error: ❌ An error occurred while processing your message. Please try again.
bot.template_fallback_error: Cannot send fallback template: Template Name or Language not configured in Settings.
bot.template_fallback_missing: Message delivery failed: it has been more than 24 hours since the user's last message. Delivery requires configuring a 'Fallback Template' in the app settings.
